title: Urgent Opening Financial Analyst at Mahindra Finance Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Financial Analyst at Mahindra Finance Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Financial Analyst with drive and ambition, Mahindra Finance Advisory Limited in Patna is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Mahindra Finance Advisory Limited:
Mahindra Finance Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Income Tax

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mahindra Finance Advisory Limited!
